name: Auburn YMCA
description: Auburn YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Auburn, NY. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts can be reserved. A membership is required to play.

name: Cato-Meridian Community Recreation Center
description: Cato-Meridian Community Recreation Center is a place to play pickleball in Cato, NY. There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Empire Haven
description: Empire Haven is a place to play pickleball in Moravia, NY. You’ll have to create your own lines and bring your own net. A membership is required to play.

name: Falcon Park
description: Falcon Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Auburn, NY. There are 6 outdoor asphalt courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Reservations are not available. The courts are free.

name: Owasco Town Park
description: Come play pickleball at Owasco Town Park in Auburn, NY! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. The courts are free.
hours: MON-FRI, 8:00 AM- 4:00 PM Summer Hour May - September: Mon-Thur 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM Friday's 8:00 AM-12:00 PM Town of Owasco NY 2 Bristol Ave. Auburn NY 13021 315-253-9021 | Fax: 315-253-2683 Government Websites by CivicPlus ® Webmaster Login New Emergency Phone Number AFTER HOURS & HOLIDAYS 315-255-6094
